title: LIFECHANGE - 211info
text: ANGELA'S HOUSE LIFECHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based transitional housing. Guests will have access to their own room, meals, an education center, a children's activity center, a commercial kitchen, a counseling center, and a chapel. 18555 NW Rock Creek Boulevard Portland, OR 97229 Eligibility: Women and women with minor children Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 802-2271 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 802-2271 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
